Game.Name: Soccer Shootout (Europe)
Game.plot: Capcom's Soccer Shootout is a Sports game, developed by A-Max and published by Epoch,which was released in Japan in 1994.Cheat: Ending PasswordAt the Main Game mode, enter the following password: 0, Orange 4, Orange 7, Green 7, 1, 4, 0, Orange 0, Orange 5, Purple 1, Orange 3, Light Blue 2, Light Blue 4, Yellow 6, Red 3, 3, 0, Red 0, Blue 0, Green 0, Blue 0, 3.Cheat: Ending PasswordAt the Main Game mode, enter the following password: 0, Yellow 0, Orange 7, Blue 7, Red 2, 0, 0, Yellow 0, Light Blue 6, Red 7, Green 6, Purple 7, Blue 4, Purple 3, Green 4, Blue 1, 0, Green 4, Light Blue 0, Yellow 5, Light Blue 5, 2.Cheat: Ending PasswordInput the following password at the main Game mode: 0, 0, Pink 1, Orange 7, Blue 7, 5, Pink 1, 1, Green 0, Red 1, Light Blue 1, Yellow 2, Blue 0, Orange 7, Light Blue 4, Pink 7, Yellow 7, Light Blue 0, Red 0, Orange 0, Red 2, 1
